mapper.sql: s.id, s.name, s.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, s.price, s.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, s.qualification_required AS qualificationRequired, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select:
select
from service_item s left join dept d on s.dept_id = d.id
and s.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and s.dept_id = #{deptId}
order by s.create_time desc

select
from service_item s left join dept d on s.dept_id = d.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into service_item (name, dept_id, price, duration_minutes, qualification_required) values (#{name}, #{deptId}, #{price}, #{durationMinutes}, #{qualificationRequired})
mapper.update: update service_item set name = #{name}, dept_id = #{deptId}, price = #{price}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, qualification_required = #{qualificationRequired} where id = #{id}
